message:
fix(scheduler): add debug_assert preventing local tasks in PriorityScheduler

schedule_local() on ThreeLaneWorker feeds tasks into the priority
scheduler, which is subject to work stealing across threads. Local
(!Send) tasks must never enter this path—they must use the local_ready
queue instead. A mis-routed local task would be polled on a foreign
thread, violating its !Send contract and causing undefined behavior.

Adds a debug_assert! that fires if a local task is passed to
schedule_local(), catching the routing bug early in debug builds rather
than manifesting as a subtle data race or UB in release.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
